creator: daviesr@cartman.techsupport.co.uk
text:
Exact same problem, ata0-slave not even mentioned if I 'boot -v'

This was freebsd-stable as of 28th August 2000
as previously mentioned, rolling back source tree to 21/08/00 fixed this.

Bog standard P133 , 32Mb RAM, Aladdin socket 7 motherboard.
Primary master is 8.5 Gb IDE .

Secondary IDE channel disabled, both in BIOs and kernel
(i.e ata1)


--

        "Not where it counts, baby."  -- Goats
